response: Jambo! Welcome to AFCON 2027 Assistant! How can I help you today?
Hi! Ready for AFCON 2027? I'm here to help with hotels and tourism!
Good morning! Ready to plan your AFCON 2027 experience?
Jambo! Karibu Tanzania! How can I assist with your AFCON journey?
I'll help you book a hotel. Which city? Dar es Salaam
Looking for a room? Let me know your preferred city and dates.
Dar es Salaam has Serena Hotel ($250) Hyatt ($220) and Peacock Hotel ($80) near the National Stadium.
Great choice! Dar es Salaam hotels near stadium: Serena $250 Hyatt $220 Holiday Inn $120 Peacock $80. What's your budget?
Arusha hotels: Arusha Serena $180 Mount Meru $150 Kibo Palace $100 Arusha Hotel $70. Perfect for safari too!
Zanzibar beach resorts: Zanzibar Serena $300 The Residence $280 TUI Blue $150 Gold Zanzibar $90.
Budget hotels start at $50 in Dar $40 in Arusha and $60 in Zanzibar per night.
Luxury hotels: Serena $250-300 Hyatt $220-280 Four Seasons $400+ per night.
Serengeti National Park is world famous! Safari packages from Arusha start at $200 per day.
The Great Wildebeest Migration in Serengeti is one of the Seven Natural Wonders of Africa!
Mount Kilimanjaro is Africa's highest peak at 5895 meters. Climbing tours take 5-9 days cost $1000-2000.
Ready for adventure? Kilimanjaro climb via Machame route takes 6-7 days. Best time June-October.
Zanzibar's best beaches: Nungwi for nightlife Kendwa for all-year swimming Paje for kite surfing.
Nungwi Beach in Zanzibar has crystal clear waters white sand and amazing sunsets!
Stone Town is Zanzibar's UNESCO World Heritage site. Great for history shopping and architecture!
AFCON 2027 runs January 10 to February 10 2027. Opening match at National Stadium Dar es Salaam.
Matches across 3 cities: National Stadium Dar (60k) Arusha Stadium (30k) Amaan Stadium Zanzibar (25k)
Group stage: Jan 10-24 Quarterfinals: Jan 26-27 Semifinals: Jan 30-31 Final: Feb 10
Taifa Stars is Tanzania's national team. They'll play group matches in Dar es Salaam.
Tickets available online via CAF website. Prices $10 for general admission $50 for VIP.
Hotel prices: Budget $50-100 Mid $100-200 Luxury $200-500 per night.
Dar: $50-300 Arusha: $40-250 Zanzibar: $60-500 per night depending on season.
Budget options start at $50/night in Dar $40 in Arusha $60 in Zanzibar.
Airport transfers cost $20-50. Most hotels offer shuttle services. Uber available in Dar.
Taxis within city: $5-15. Always negotiate price first or use metered taxis.
Buses from Dar to Arusha: Kilimanjaro Express $25 8 hours. Luxury buses available.
Ferry from Dar to Zanzibar: Azam Marine $35 2 hours. Book in advance during AFCON.
Must-try dishes: Ugali cornmeal Nyama Choma grilled meat Zanzibar Pizza and fresh seafood!
Local meals cost $3-8. Try Pilau rice Mishkaki beef skewers and Chipsi Mayai chips with eggs.
Popular restaurants: The Waterfront Dar Kulture Arusha Emerson Spice Zanzibar.
Emergency contacts: Police 112 Ambulance 114 Tourist Police +255 22 212 3232
Major hospitals: Aga Khan Dar Arusha Lutheran Arusha Mnazi Mmoja Zanzibar.
Contact your embassy immediately. US Embassy +255 22 229 4000 UK Embassy +255 22 229 0000
Karibu Tanzania! Enjoy AFCON 2027! Safe travels and come back anytime!
You're welcome! Have a wonderful time in Tanzania. Asante sana!
Kwaheri! Enjoy the matches and your stay in Tanzania!
